---
name: review-sprint-results
description: Report the results of the previous sprint and prepare backlog updates for the next sprint.
---

# Review Sprint Results Prompt

Please summarize the results of the previous sprint and propose the next sprint's backlog updates.

Include:

- Completed work and results
- Issues and blockers
- Lessons learned
- Recommended changes to client and server backlogs
- Proposed tasks for the next sprint

Make sure to get confirmation before finalizing the next sprint plan.
